Chef · Consultant · Curator

Chef Sam

Food is a story worth telling.

Food is the most honest form of storytelling there is.

A well-travelled culinary mind distilling global inspiration, intuition, and ritual into experiences that collapse the world to a single plate. From intimate gatherings to grand feasts, food done with complete intention.

Storytelling Multi-cultural Event Curation Foraging Consulting Fine Dining Entrepreneurial
Founder, Catering Operation London, UK
01

About Me

A chef who has spent a lifetime eating the world — and cooking it back.

From high-end gala kitchens to sun-baked outdoor weddings, from fine dining tasting menus to street food operations: I bring a shamanic instinct and a curious approach to food that treats every plate as a piece of a story.

As the founder of an independent catering business, I bring an entrepreneurial edge to everything I do: building menus, managing teams, controlling budgets, and working with producers and foragers to keep things seasonal, honest, and current.

Equally at home consulting restaurants on creative direction and operations, running a field kitchen for 1,200, or plating a 10-course tasting dinner for 12.

02

Food Philosophy

✦

The Wanderer's Palate

A life spent travelling: markets, street vendors, farm kitchens, fine dining institutions. Every dish is a postcard from somewhere real.

↻

Intuition Over Formula

Reading an ingredient, a season, a room. The real work happens in the moment of decision, not the recipe.

◈

Themed Worlds

Full sensory experiences: menus as narratives, events as immersive journeys. From concept to final dish, every detail considered.

∞

Perpetually Evolving

Live-fire, fermentation, zero-waste, modern technique: absorbed into a personal, evolving style. Tradition and innovation in constant conversation.

✧

Seasonal and Foraged

The calendar is the best menu planner. Hyper-local sourcing, wild ingredients, honest provenance.

✽

Flavour First

The visual, the sensory, the atmosphere — all of it matters. But none of it saves a dish that does not taste extraordinary.

04

Operational Expertise

4.1

Think-Tank Consulting

Embedded advisory for restaurants, hospitality groups, and brands. Bridging culinary vision with commercial reality.

Concept DevMenu StrategyBrand Alignment

4.2

Menu Architecture

From a 3-course tasting menu to a buffet for 1,000: menus that are logistically executable, seasonally led, and genuinely memorable.

CostingsLogisticsDietary Mapping

4.3

Culinary Critique

Sharp, constructive and empathetic analysis of food, technique, and kitchen operations, from line-cook fundamentals to head chef vision.

R&DRecipe DevQuality Audit

4.4

Event Production

End-to-end culinary direction from intimate 50-guest weddings to 1,000+ person high-end corporate occasions.

High-VolumeBespoke WeddingsThemed Banquets

4.5

Business and Budgeting

Founder of an independent catering operation. P&L, procurement, stock control, and supplier relationships.

ProcurementStock ControlGP Management

Team Leadership

Building environments where chefs feel ownership, creativity is encouraged, and standards are maintained with care.

Brigade ManagementMentoringCulture
